#  Godforge PR Checklist (MANDATORY)

> This PR must pass all quality gates before approval. No exceptions.

##  Requirements

- [ ] All tests pass (unit, E2E, snapshots)
- [ ] Fully responsive layout (mobile → 4K)
- [ ] A11y-compliant (WCAG 2.1 AA)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets/tokens/URLs
- [ ] No legacy code, placeholder content, or commented-out blocks
- [ ] Code is linted, formatted, and reviewed
- [ ] Final output is production-ready: no follow-up commits required

##  Notes / Clarifications
<!-- Optional: Describe any tradeoffs, known issues, or spec clarifications -->
